    C

    clinicalFinding(long, String, String, String) - Static method in record class org.ike.example.Concept
    Factory method for creating a clinical finding concept.
    Concept - Record Class in org.ike.example
    Example terminology concept demonstrating SNOMED CT-like structures.
    Concept(long, String, String, String) - Constructor for record class org.ike.example.Concept
    Creates a concept with validation.
    conceptId() - Method in record class org.ike.example.Concept
    Returns the value of the conceptId record component.

    D

    definition() - Method in record class org.ike.example.Concept
    Returns the value of the definition record component.

    E

    equals(Object) - Method in record class org.ike.example.Concept
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.

    F

    fullySpecifiedName() - Method in record class org.ike.example.Concept
    Returns the value of the fullySpecifiedName record component.

    H

    hashCode() - Method in record class org.ike.example.Concept
    Returns a hash code value for this object.

    I

    isPrimitive() - Method in record class org.ike.example.Concept
    Determines if this concept is a primitive (non-fully-defined) concept.

    O

    org.ike.example - package org.ike.example
     

    P

    preferredTerm() - Method in record class org.ike.example.Concept
    Returns the value of the preferredTerm record component.

    T

    toString() - Method in record class org.ike.example.Concept
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
